task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface is visible, showing the dashboard or main navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Assets module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assets' tab is active, and an asset list or asset dashboard is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the specific target workstations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workstations named 'OLD-PC-01', 'OLD-PC-02', 'OLD-PC-03', 'OLD-PC-04', and 'OLD-PC-05' are visible in the asset list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selected the target workstations for a bulk update.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the target workstations are checked, or a bulk action dialog/menu is open specifically for these assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that the status of the target workstations was changed to 'Disposed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The state/status column for the target workstations shows 'Disposed', or a success message confirms the bulk update to 'Disposed' state.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface in a browser. No terminal windows executing scripts or API calls should be used to complete the task.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the actual ServiceDesk Plus application, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database clients (e.g., psql, pgAdmin) or terminal windows showing SQL UPDATE commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets to be updated: 'OLD-PC-01', 'OLD-PC-02', 'OLD-PC-03', 'OLD-PC-04', 'OLD-PC-05'. Initial state: 'In Store'. Target state: 'Disposed'.
